title: Earthquake Safety
answer: Earthquake me: Drop, Cover, Hold On. Windows se door rahen, lift use na karein, shaking ke baad gas/electric check karein.

title: Flood Safety
answer: Flood me: pani me na chalein na drive karein. High ground par move karein. Updates follow karein. Electric lines se door rahen.

title: Fire Safety
answer: Fire me: Stop, Drop, Roll (agar kapray jal rahe hon). Smoke me low ho kar move karein. Stairs use karein, elevator nahi.

title: Emergency Kit
answer: Emergency kit: water, dry food, torch, power bank, first aid, medicines, IDs copies, whistle, mask, cash, radio.

title: SOS Help
answer: SOS ke liye app me SOS button use karein. Message me apni location + short note add karein. Emergency contact verify karein.
